Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}I-It's so nice out today... Feels like springtime's arrived.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Doesn't it? The cherry blossoms at Gekkoukan High were in full bloom... Though they seemed to have flowered a bit late this year.[n]{f 1 1}
